summary.zh: 把发动机放到车手身后的革命者。1958 年斯特林·莫斯驾驶私人车队的库珀 T43 在阿根廷大奖赛夺冠，这是后置发动机赛车在 F1 的首场胜利，从此赛车设计方向被彻底改写。
summary.en: The revolutionary that put the engine behind the driver. Stirling Moss drove a private Cooper T43 to victory at the 1958 Argentine GP—the first win for a rear-engined car in F1, rewriting the direction of racing car design.

layout.zh: 后置发动机（革命性布局）

heading.zh: 把发动机挪到车手身后

content.zh:
1950 年代的大部分赛车都沿用前置发动机布局。库珀把发动机放到车手身后，原因其实很务实：他们从低级别方程式起家，后置布局便于用摩托车发动机与链条传动，却意外发现它让车身更短、重量分布更优、操控更敏捷。

1958 年阿根廷大奖赛，斯特林·莫斯为罗布·沃克的私人车队驾驶库珀 T43 夺冠，成为后置发动机赛车在 F1 世界锦标赛的首场胜利。马力不及对手的 T43 凭借更佳的重量分布与操控赢了下去。

这场胜利是一个分水岭。到 1960 年，几乎全场都改用了后置发动机；莲花、布拉汉姆、BRM 纷纷跟进，前置发动机赛车在 F1 几年内便彻底绝迹。
content.en:
Most 1950s racing cars kept the engine up front. Cooper put it behind the driver for pragmatic reasons: starting in junior formulae, the rear layout suited motorcycle engines and chain drive, and they found it gave a shorter, better-balanced, more agile car.

At the 1958 Argentine GP Stirling Moss, in Rob Walker's privately entered Cooper T43, took the first world-championship win for a rear-engined car. Out-powered but better balanced and nimbler, the T43 won on its merits.

It was a watershed. By 1960 nearly the whole field had gone rear-engined; Lotus, Brabham and BRM followed, and the front-engined F1 car was extinct within a few seasons.
